OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CONNECTOR_RUN_AND_TERMINATE.description: If true, the connector will run once and terminate.

CONNECTOR_SEND_TO_QUEUE.description: If true, the connector will send data to the queue.

CONNECTOR_SEND_TO_DIRECTORY.description: If true, the connector will send data to a directory.

CONNECTOR_SEND_TO_DIRECTORY_PATH.description: The path to the directory to send data to (required if CONNECTOR_SEND_TO_DIRECTORY is true).

CONNECTOR_SEND_TO_DIRECTORY_RETENTION.description: The retention period in days for data sent to the directory.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TOKEN_USER.description: The Cofense ThreatHQ API token user.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TOKEN_PASSWORD.description: The Cofense ThreatHQ API token password.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: The start date for importing data. Format: 'YYYY-MM-DD' or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS+HH:MM' or ISO 8601 duration.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_BASE_URL.description: The base URL for the Cofense ThreatHQ API.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_LEAKY_BUCKET_RATE.description: The leaky bucket rate for API requests.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_LEAKY_BUCKET_CAPACI.description: The leaky bucket capacity for API requests.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_RETRY.description: The number of API request retries.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_BACKOFF.description: The backoff duration between API retries (ISO 8601 duration).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPACT_TO_EXCLUDE.description: Comma-separated list of impact levels to exclude. Available values: none, moderate, major.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPORT_REPORT_PDF.description: If true, import report PDFs from Cofense ThreatHQ.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TLP_LEVEL.description: The TLP marking level to apply.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_PROMOTE_OBSERVABLES_AS_.description: If true, promote observables as indicators.
